summary: Fixed 6 pagination styling issues: removed gaps and border-radius from bottom bars, prevented layout shift on hover using outline, added padding-bottom protection, kept text black on hover, fixed arrow icons using background-image SVG, and made bottom bars consistent across all items
userRevisions: Remove space between ::after elements and their border-radius - make continuous line
Prevent ::after element from moving on hover by using outline instead of border
Add padding-bottom to nav-links to protect space for ::after elements
Keep text black/charcoal on hover instead of white
Fix next arrow not showing up (was conflicting with ::after bottom bar)
Fix ::after line for next button showing up properly

changes: Changed gap-1 to gap-0 (no gaps between items)
Changed bottom: -6px to bottom: 0 (flush with element)
Removed border-radius: 10px (no rounded corners for continuous line)
Changed border to outline: 1px solid with outline-offset: -1px (prevents layout shift)
Changed text-white to text-charcoal (keep text black on hover)
Removed border and border-charcoal from hover state
Removed ::before pseudo-element for prev arrow (was using border hack)
Removed ::after pseudo-element for next arrow (was conflicting with bottom bar)
Added ::after for bottom bar on both prev/next (consistent with page numbers)
Changed to background-image with layered SVG arrows (gradient + arrow icon)
Prev arrow: left-pointing chevron SVG data URI
Next arrow: right-pointing chevron SVG data URI

issue1_gaps_and_borderRadius.problem: ::after bottom bars had gaps between them and rounded corners
issue1_gaps_and_borderRadius.solution: Changed gap-1 to gap-0, removed border-radius from ::after, changed bottom: -6px to bottom: 0

issue2_afterMovingOnHover.problem: ::after bar shifted when hovering because border changes box model
issue2_afterMovingOnHover.solution: Changed from border to outline with outline-offset: -1px (doesn't affect layout)

issue3_paddingBottomProtection.problem: Nav-links container had no padding-bottom, ::after elements could be clipped
issue3_paddingBottomProtection.solution: Added pb-2 to .nav-links for bottom padding protection

issue4_textColorOnHover.problem: Hover state changed text to white
issue4_textColorOnHover.solution: Changed text-white to text-charcoal in hover state

issue5_nextArrowNotShowing.problem: Next arrow icon not displaying (::after was used for arrow, conflicting with bottom bar)
issue5_nextArrowNotShowing.solution: Replaced ::before/::after arrow hacks with background-image SVG layering technique

issue6_nextButtonBottomBar.problem: Bottom bar for next/prev using box-shadow didn't match visual appearance
issue6_nextButtonBottomBar.solution: Changed to ::after pseudo-element (same as page numbers) for consistency

technicalNotes: Nav-links gap changed from gap-1 (0.25rem) to gap-0 for continuous bottom bar line
Page numbers ::after positioned at bottom: 0 (flush) instead of bottom: -6px
Removed border-radius from all ::after elements to create continuous horizontal line
Hover uses outline with outline-offset: -1px to avoid box model changes and layout shift
Outline appears inside the element bounds, preventing ::after movement
Hover text stays charcoal for readability against gradient background
Prev/next arrows converted from ::before/::after border hacks to background-image SVG
Background-image uses layering: gradient layer + SVG arrow icon layer
This frees up ::after for bottom bar on prev/next buttons
All bottom bars now use ::after consistently (page numbers, prev, next)
Arrow SVGs use data URI with white stroke, 8x8px viewport
Padding-bottom (pb-2) on nav-links prevents ::after clipping and provides vertical breathing room

verification.accessibility: maintained (ARIA attributes, keyboard support, screen reader announcements)
verification.visualIntegrity: bottom bars form continuous line, no movement on hover, arrows display correctly
